security_probes.title: Search Query Injection
security_probes.description: Test whether search queries with shell metacharacters cause command injection or unauthorized path access

security_probes.title: Document-based Injection
security_probes.description: Test whether indexed documents containing hidden instructions can hijack downstream processing

security_probes.title: Sensitive Data Leakage via Search Results
security_probes.description: Test whether search results expose passwords, API keys, PII, or confidential document content

security_probes.title: Index Pollution and Ranking Manipulation
security_probes.description: Test whether malicious documents can poison the search index and manipulate result rankings

security_probes.title: Directory Sandbox Escape
security_probes.description: Test whether search can escape designated index directory via path traversal, symlinks, or encoding bypass

security_probes.title: Resource Exhaustion and Denial of Service
security_probes.description: Test whether resource-intensive queries, ReDoS, high concurrency, or index flooding cause service denial
